basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 13 Specialist, Senior Resident and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 67 years for all posts. Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/EWS as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree/DNB/Diploma in concerned specialty, MBBS with experience for Junior Resident
qualification.details: Specialist (Pathology, Dermatology, Orthopaedics, Radiology, General Surgery, General Medicine): PG Degree or equivalent with 03-year Post PG experience or PG Diploma with 05-year post PG experience in respective specialty from recognized university with valid MCI/State Medical Council registration. Senior Resident (OBS & GYANE, Orthopaedics, General Medicine, Ophthalmology): PG Degree or diploma / DNB in concerned specialty from recognized university with valid MCI/State Medical Council registration. Junior Resident: PG Degree or diploma / DNB preferred; otherwise MBBS with experience/good clinical knowledge; preference to candidates worked in ESIC with Dhanwantri module knowledge.

salary_details.details: Specialist: Rs. 121408 Per Month Senior Resident: 7th CPC Level 11 Junior Resident: Rs. 121048 Per Month

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Minimum 50% marks in interview compulsory for selection

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Specialist / Senior Resident / Junior Resident posts is scheduled to be held on 30 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies announced for the posts of Specialist, Senior Resident, and Junior Resident in the Employees State Insurance Corporation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee required for General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the ESIC posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Specialist, Senior Resident, and Junior Resident posts is 67 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Junior Resident post is Rs. 121048 per month. For Senior Residents, it is 7th CPC Level 11, and for Specialists, it is Rs. 121408 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification. A minimum of 50% marks in the interview is compulsory for selection.

faq.question: Q7. What qualifications are required for the Specialist posts?
faq.answer: For Specialist posts, candidates need a PG Degree or equivalent with 03 years of post-PG experience or a PG Diploma with 05 years of post-PG experience in the respective specialty, along with valid MCI/State Medical Council registration.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any preference for Junior Resident candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have worked in ESIC and have knowledge of the Dhanwantri module.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ESIC, Bikaner, Rajasthan, with the pincode 334001. Candidates should report to the specified venue on the interview date.

faq.question: Q10. Do I need to apply online for this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online; they should directly report to the interview venue with all required documents.
